label: Ritual outcome comp (loudspeakers)
description: Scores quality based on the number of powered loudspeakers within maxDistance of the ritual target, evaluated via a curve.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is computed from the curve.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: SimpleCurve mapping the number of active loudspeakers (X) to quality offset (Y).

maxDistance.label: Max distance
maxDistance.description: Maximum cell distance from the ritual target within which loudspeakers are counted.
